name: attack_nearest_hostile
description: Engage the nearest hostile mob within range using current weapon, or kite if overwhelmed
parameters: z.object({ maxSearchRadius: z.number().int().min(2).max(40).default(12).describe("Radius to scan for hostile mobs"), engageDistance: z.number().min(1.5).max(5).default(2.5).describe("Target distance to maintain while attacking"), weaponName: z.string().default("stone_sword").describe("Name of preferred weapon in inventory to equip"), kiteHealthThreshold: z.number().int().min(0).max(20).default(8).describe("Kite away if health drops to this level") })

name: move_to_player
description: Move toward a target player to maintain close proximity for defensive cooperation
parameters: z.object({ targetPlayerId: z.union([z.number().int(), z.string()]).optional().describe("The entity ID of the target player to follow"), targetPlayerName: z.string().optional().describe("The username of the target player to follow"), followDistanceBlocks: z.number().min(0).max(10).default(3).describe("Desired distance to maintain from the target player"), stopRangeBlocks: z.number().min(0).max(5).default(1.5).describe("Minimum distance to stop to avoid pushing the target") })

name: eat_bread
description: Consume a piece of bread to restore health when health is low
parameters: z.object({ itemName: z.string().default("bread").describe("The name of the food item to consume, e.g., 'bread'"), maxCount: z.number().int().min(1).max(5).default(1).describe("The maximum number of food items to consume in this session") })

name: kite_nearest_hostile
description: Back away from the nearest hostile while keeping distance, allowing ranged attacks or letting teammates engage
parameters: z.object({ maxTicks: z.number().int().min(20).max(1200).default(80).describe("Maximum game ticks to continue kiting (20 ticks = 1 second)"), preferredDistance: z.number().min(2).max(25).default(8).describe("Desired distance to maintain from the nearest hostile mob"), retreatBlocks: z.number().min(1).max(12).default(6).describe("Distance to jump back when an enemy is within the preferred range") })
code: const hostileNames = new Set(['zombie', 'skeleton', 'husk', 'drowned', 'stray', 'spider', 'creeper', 'baby_zombie', 'enderman', 'witch', 'pillager', 'ravager', 'piglin', 'hoglin', 'silverfish', 'endermite', 'vex', 'vindicator', 'evoker', 'phantom']); const isHostile = function(e) { if (!e || !e.isValid || e.id === bot.entity.id) return false; if (e.type === 'player' || e.type === 'object') return false; const n = (e.name || '').toLowerCase(); return (e.kind === 'Hostile mobs' || e.type === 'hostile' || e.type === 'mob' || hostileNames.has(n)); }; if (!bot.entity || bot.health <= 0) return '<UNSAFE>: Bot is dead.'; const getNearest = function() { return Object.values(bot.entities).filter(isHostile).sort(function(a, b) { return bot.entity.position.distanceSquared(a.position) - bot.entity.position.distanceSquared(b.position); })[0]; }; const startTarget = getNearest(); if (!startTarget) return '<NO TARGET>: No hostiles nearby to kite.'; const bow = bot.inventory.items().find(function(i) { return i.name === 'bow'; }); const arrows = bot.inventory.items().some(function(i) { return i.name.includes('arrow'); }); if (bow && arrows) { await bot.equip(bow, 'hand'); } startBackgroundSkill(bot, 'kite_nearest_hostile', async function(token) { const moves = new Movements(bot); moves.canDig = false; moves.allowSprinting = true; bot.pathfinder.setMovements(moves); const maxMs = args.maxTicks * 50; const startTime = Date.now(); try { while (canContinueBotAction(bot, token)) { if (Date.now() - startTime > maxMs) break; const target = getNearest(); if (!target) { bot.pathfinder.setGoal(null); if (!await waitForActiveMs(bot, token, 200)) break; continue; } if (!await waitUntilWorldActive(bot, token)) break; const dist = bot.entity.position.distanceTo(target.position); await bot.lookAt(target.position.offset(0, target.height || 1.6, 0), true); if (dist < args.preferredDistance) { const diff = bot.entity.position.minus(target.position); diff.y = 0; let dir = diff.normalize(); if (diff.norm() < 0.1) { dir = new Vec3(Math.random() - 0.5, 0, Math.random() - 0.5).normalize(); } const rPos = bot.entity.position.plus(dir.scaled(args.retreatBlocks)); bot.pathfinder.setGoal(new goals.GoalNear(rPos.x, rPos.y, rPos.z, 2)); } else if (dist > args.preferredDistance + 2) { bot.pathfinder.setGoal(null); } if (!await waitForActiveMs(bot, token, 100)) break; } } finally { bot.pathfinder.setGoal(null); bot.clearControlStates(); } }); return '<STARTED>: Kiting hostiles for ' + args.maxTicks + ' ticks.';

name: equip_leather_tunic
description: Equip the leather tunic from inventory for protection
parameters: z.object({ itemName: z.string().default("leather_tunic").describe("Name or display name of the leather protection to equip, e.g., leather_tunic") })

name: drop_bread
description: Drop bread items toward a target player who needs healing
parameters: z.object({ itemName: z.string().default("bread").describe("The name of the item to drop, e.g., 'bread'"), quantity: z.number().int().min(1).max(64).default(2).describe("The amount of the item to drop"), targetPlayerName: z.string().describe("The name of the player who should receive the items") })

name: build_cover
description: Place oak_planks toward teammate for defensive cover
parameters: z.object({ targetPlayerName: z.string().describe("The name of the teammate to provide cover for"), itemName: z.string().default("oak_planks").describe("The type of block to use for cover"), maxBlocks: z.number().int().min(1).max(10).default(2).describe("The number of blocks to place in a pillar"), pillarDistance: z.number().min(1).max(4).default(2).describe("How far away from the teammate to place the cover") })
